mapper.select: SELECT u.user_oid AS userOid, u.user_nm_korn AS userNmKorn, u.user_nm_eng AS userNmEng, u.brdt AS brdt, u.user_id AS userId, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(u.eml_lcal, #{aesKey}) AS emlLcal, u.eml_dmn AS emlDmn, u.mpno_pfx AS mpnoPfx, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(u.mpno_mid, #{aesKey}) AS mpno_mid, u.mpno_sfx AS mpnoSfx, u.dept_nm AS deptNm, u.jbps_nm AS jbpsNm, u.use_yn AS useYn, u.prvc_use_yn AS prvcUseYn, u.prvc_reg_id AS prvcRegId, u.prvc_start_dt AS prvcStartDt, u.prvc_end_dt AS prvcEndDt, u.lgn_fail_cnt AS lgnFailCnt, DATE_FORMAT(u.reg_dt, '%Y.%m.%d. %H:%i') AS regDt, CONCAT(u.mpno_pfx, '-', ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(u.mpno_mid, #{aesKey}), '-', u.mpno_sfx) AS phone, CONCAT(${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(u.eml_lcal, #{aesKey}), '@', u.eml_dmn) AS email FROM ${schema}.user u WHERE u.user_oid = #{egovMap.userOid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.user ( user_nm_korn, user_nm_eng, brdt, user_id, pswd, user_authrt, user_type, eml_lcal, eml_dmn, mpno_pfx, mpno_mid, mpno_sfx, inst_oid, inst_nm, dept_cd, dept_nm, jbps_cd, jbps_nm, lgn_fail_cnt, prvc_use_yn, prvc_reg_id, prvc_start_dt, prvc_end_dt, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt ) VALUES ( #{userNmKorn}, #{userNmEng}, #{brdt}, #{userId}, #{pswd}, #{userAuthrt}, #{userType}, #{emlLcal}, #{emlDmn}, #{mpnoPfx}, #{mpnoMid}, #{mpnoSfx}, #{instOid}, #{instNm}, #{deptCd}, #{deptNm}, #{jbpsCd}, #{jbpsNm}, 0, #{prvcUseYn}, #{prvcRegId}, #{prvcStartDt}, #{prvcEndDt}, #{useYn}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{mdfcnId}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE ${schema}.user
user_nm_korn = #{userNmKorn}, user_nm_eng = #{userNmEng}, brdt = #{brdt}, eml_lcal = #{emlLcal}, eml_dmn = #{emlDmn}, mpno_pfx = #{mpnoPfx}, mpno_mid = #{mpnoMid}, mpno_sfx = #{mpnoSfx},
inst_oid = #{instOid},
inst_nm = #{instNm},
dept_cd = #{deptCd}, dept_nm = #{deptNm}, jbps_cd = #{jbpsCd}, jbps_nm = #{jbpsNm}, prvc_use_yn = #{prvcUseYn}, prvc_reg_id = #{prvcRegId}, prvc_start_dt = #{prvcStartDt}, prvc_end_dt = #{prvcEndDt}, use_yn = #{useYn}, mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW()
, pswd = #{pswd}
WHERE user_oid = #{userOid}
UPDATE ${schema}.user SET user_stts = 'ACTIVE', lgn_fail_cnt = 0, mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE user_oid = #{userOid}
